queries.question: When do currency and interest rate swaps offered by Royal Bank expire?
queries.sql:
SELECT Currency_Swaps.maturity_date
FROM Banks JOIN Currency_Swaps ON Banks.name = Currency_Swaps.bank_name
WHERE Banks.name = "Royal Bank"
UNION
SELECT Interest_Rate_Swaps.end_date
FROM Banks JOIN Interest_Rate_Swaps ON Banks.name = Interest_Rate_Swaps.bank_name
WHERE Banks.name = "Royal Bank"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?banks a :Banks .
    ?currency_swaps a :Currency_Swaps .
    ?banks p:name ?name_l .
    ?currency_swaps p:bank_name ?bank_name_r .
    ?currency_swaps p:maturity_date ?maturity_date .
    ?banks p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_l) = STR(?bank_name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Royal Bank")
    BIND(?maturity_date AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?banks a :Banks .
    ?interest_rate_swaps a :Interest_Rate_Swaps .
    ?banks p:name ?name_l .
    ?interest_rate_swaps p:bank_name ?bank_name_r .
    ?interest_rate_swaps p:end_date ?end_date .
    ?banks p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_l) = STR(?bank_name_r))
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Royal Bank")
    BIND(?end_date AS ?o0)
  }
}
